objectives: Implement task decomposition engine to prevent token truncation
Add early rejection detection to prevent cascade failures
Restore sprint execution capacity with simplified, atomic tasks

tasks.context: Create new agent at agents/decomposition-engine.yaml following existing agent patterns. Agent should analyze incoming tasks and auto-split any task requiring changes to 3+ files into atomic subtasks of 1-2 files each. Model: minimax/MiniMax-M2.5. Add to task pipeline before execution.

review.notes: decomposition-engine agent already created at agents/decomposition-engine/ by CTO proposal on 2026-03-07. Task is complete.

tasks.description: Add early rejection detector to orchestrator
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to add rejection detection hook. After each task result, check if status='rejected' and consecutive_failures >= 2 for that agent. If true, emit warning and pause agent queue for 1 hour. This prevents cascade failures from consuming entire sprint.
tasks.verified_done: 2026-03-08 verified against codebase by Tarek + Claude

tasks.description: Restart mission-control and x-dm-outreach PM2 processes
tasks.context: Execute 'pm2 restart mission-control x-dm-outreach pm2-process-watchdog' to restore DOWN processes. Verify they stay online for 10 minutes. These processes are critical for system monitoring and outreach automation.
tasks.verified_done: 2026-03-08 verified against codebase by Tarek + Claude

tasks.description: Add Polygon mainnet to chain registry (atomic)
tasks.context: Edit ONLY backend/src/config/chains.ts to add Polygon mainnet configuration. ChainId: 137, RPC: https://polygon-rpc.com, block explorer: polygonscan.com, native token: MATIC. Include USDC contract: 0x2791Bca1f2de4661ED88A30C99A7a9449Aa84174. Follow existing Ethereum/BSC pattern. Single file change only.
tasks.verified_done: 2026-03-08 verified against codebase by Tarek + Claude

tasks.description: Add Polygon support to EVM settlement detector (atomic)
tasks.context: Edit ONLY backend/src/services/settlement/evm-detector.ts to handle chainId 137 in detectSettlement() function. Add Polygon-specific gas estimation (use 30 gwei default vs 50 for Ethereum). Keep all Ethereum logic unchanged. Single file change only.
tasks.verified_done: 2026-03-08 verified against codebase by Tarek + Claude

tasks.description: Add Polygon routing to settlement router (atomic)
tasks.context: Edit ONLY backend/src/services/settlement/settlement-router.ts to route chainId 137 to EVM detector. Add '137' to SUPPORTED_CHAINS array and add case in switch statement. Keep Solana/Ethereum routes unchanged. Single file change only.
tasks.verified_done: 2026-03-08 verified against codebase by Tarek + Claude

tasks.description: Fix error middleware type error in app.ts
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/app.ts line 43 to ensure error middleware validates status code is integer before calling res.status(). Current error: .status() receiving string 'Validation failed' instead of integer. Add type guard: const statusCode = typeof err.status === 'number' ? err.status : 500; then use res.status(statusCode). Single file change only.
tasks.verified_done: 2026-03-08 verified against codebase by Tarek + Claude

notes: Recovery sprint after 100% task failure in week-9. Focus on atomic tasks (1 file each) to avoid token truncation. Implementing CTO-approved decomposition engine and cascade prevention. Target: 5/7 tasks approved minimum to prove pipeline recovery.
